records.ety: [AS. rōd a cross; akin to OS. rōda, D. roede rod, G. ruthe, rute, OHG. ruota. Cf. Rod a measure.]

defs: A representation in sculpture or in painting of the cross with Christ hanging on it.
quotes: Savior, in thine image seen Bleeding on that precious rood.
notes: ☞ Generally, the Trinity is represented, the Father as an elderly man fully clothed, with a nimbus around his head, and holding the cross on which the Son is represented as crucified, the Holy Spirit descending in the form of a dove near the Son's head. Figures of the Virgin Mary and of St. John are often placed near the principal figures.

defs: A measure of five and a half yards in length; a rod; a perch; a pole.
The fourth part of an acre, or forty square rods.
